title: Aesthetic Visuals
description: A Minecraft resource pack aiming to improve the aesthetics of the game
body:
Aesthetic Visuals is a resource pack that aims to improve the vibes and overall feel of Minecraft.  The packs changes range from custom entity models, and tweaked item textures, to a full-blown shift in the way the game looks.  It will never be _truly_ complete, as every change is based on vibes.

Aesthetic Visuals relies on the use of mods like Entity Texture Features, Entity Model Features, and Polytone to work.
